hero.description: Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience. Angular, React, TypeScript. Companies like Tecnova, IBM and Izertis. Passionate about architecture and design.

bullets: Development with React 19+ and TypeScript under hexagonal architecture and microfrontends.
Implementation of SCSS design tokens and dynamic multi-brand theming.
Proactive refactoring to improve maintainability and scalability.
Technical PR Reviews focused on architecture, typing and performance.
Secure backend integration and robust error handling.
Technical Leadership: Sole responsible for the Frontend area in strategic Telefónica projects. Constant coordination with the Software Architecture team.
Deep refactoring of legacy applications towards a modern ecosystem based on Angular 15 and TypeScript.
Implementation of complex asynchronous data flows with RxJS. Internationalization with Ngx-Translate.
Advanced version control with GitFlow (GitHub, Fork).
Led the progressive upgrade from Angular 8 to Angular 18, solving compatibility issues and optimizing performance.
Responsible for the lifecycle, development and maintenance of the interface, with JavaScript, TypeScript, CSS and Bootstrap.
Architected and developed the admin panel from scratch with Angular 16, Angular Material and NgApexCharts.
API consumption with Swagger and Postman. DB management with Toad Oracle. Agile flow with GitFlow, Jira and Trello.

edu1.degree: Advanced Certificate in Web Application Development

edu2.degree: Intermediate Certificate in IT Technology and Computer Systems

react.description: Development of scalable ecosystems under Hexagonal Architecture and Microfrontends with Module Federation.

angular.description: Versions 8 to 18. Critical migrations, modular architecture, lazy loading and complex dashboards.

ts.description: Strict contract typing, generics, utility types and scalable architectures.

js.description: ES6+, advanced async, closures and core application logic.

scss.description: Multi-tenant theming, Design Tokens, mixins and BEM architecture in enterprise projects.

bootstrap.description: Consistent and responsive interface design with grid system and components.

git.description: Branching strategies, submodules and conflict resolution in large teams.

github.description: Version control, PR reviews, Actions and team collaboration.

fork.description: Advanced Git client management and visual conflict resolution.

swagger.description: Reading and integrating documented API contracts.

postman.description: Endpoint testing, collections and response validation.

jira.description: Agile methodologies, sprints and software lifecycle management.

toad.description: Management and querying of Oracle relational databases.

about.label: About me
about.name: Hi, I'm Hubert Chim
about.intro:
Front-end Software Engineer with 5+ years transforming complex web ecosystems. I have worked in enterprise environments for clients like Telefónica/O2 at IBM, led the technical evolution of Movelia.es at Tecnova, and currently drive Microfrontend and Design Token architectures at Izertis.

My approach combines code efficiency with a clear business vision. I don't just execute tasks — I take technical ownership, participate in architecture decisions and safeguard team quality through PR reviews and mentoring.

motivation.label: Motivation
motivation.title: Why am I a developer?
motivation.text: I got into development because I was fascinated by the idea of building things people actually use. What started as curiosity became a vocation when I saw the real impact of a good frontend: speed, clarity, user trust. Today I'm still driven by the same fundamentals — solving complex problems with elegant solutions and building products that scale without losing quality.

items.title: Clean code
items.text: Every line has a purpose. Maintainability and readability above all.

items.title: Architecture first
items.text: Today's technical decisions determine tomorrow's team velocity.

items.title: Continuous improvement
items.text: PR reviews, refactoring and constant learning are part of the job.

items.title: Technical ownership
items.text: Own the product, not just execute tickets.

hobbies.label: Beyond code
hobbies.title: Free time
hobbies.text: When I'm not at the computer you'll find me working out, reading about productivity and mindset, playing football or exploring side projects that let me keep learning new technologies without pressure.
